praṇālaḥ -lī, praṇālikā
1 A channel, water-course, drain; kurvan pūrṇā nayanapayasāṃ cakravālaiḥ praṇālīḥ Ud. S.
2;  Śi. 3. 44. 
2 Succession, uninterrupted series.
